title: leonotis decadonta var. porotoensis
intro: Leonotis decadonta var. porotoensis, also known as the 'Cape honeysuckle' or 'Kings mantle', is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to the southwestern parts of South Africa. The medicinal properties of Leonotis decadonta var. porotoensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of depression. Herbal preparations of Leonotis decadonta var. porotoensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
